premise: Aspirin is indicated for the relief of minor aches and pains and to reduce fever.

tests.hypothesis: Aspirin can help reduce fever and relieve minor pain.
Aspirin is primarily used to increase body temperature and cause fever.
Aspirin might occasionally be used to treat bacterial infections.

premise: Lisinopril is an ACE inhibitor used to treat high blood pressure and heart failure.

tests.hypothesis: Lisinopril is used for managing high blood pressure.
Lisinopril is an antibiotic used to cure viral infections.
